description: This file defines data transfer objects (DTOs) related to Root Cause Analysis (Rca) for API communication, including response and request models, with methods to map domain objects to DTOs.

classes.name: RcaDtos.RcaResponse
classes.description: A DTO representing the response data for Root Cause Analysis, including a factory method to create it from an Rca domain object.

classes.name: RcaDtos.UpsertRcaRequest
classes.description: A DTO for creating or updating an Rca entity, with validation annotations.

methods.name: from
methods.description: Converts an Rca domain object into an RcaResponse DTO.
